name: Nebulizer
descs:
First Turn Start of an Encounter: all allies gain 4 [Breath] Potency and +4 [Breath] Count.

When activating Pride Absolute Resonance, all allies gain 2 [Breath] Potency and +2 [Breath] Count at Combat Start.
- [Cannot Stack] When Thoracalgia Ryōshū E.G.O Passive 「Breath」 activates, this effect does not activate

First Turn Start of a wave: All allies gain 5 [Breath] Potency and +4 [Breath] Count.

When activating Pride Absolute Resonance, all allies gain 3 [Breath] Potency and +2 [Breath] Count.
- [Cannot Stack] When Thoracalgia Ryōshū E.G.O Passive 「Breath」 activates, this effect does not activate

First Turn Start of a wave: all allies gain 5 [Breath] Potency and +5 [Breath] Count.

When activating Pride Resonance, all allies gain 3 [Breath] Potency and +3 [Breath] Count at Combat Start.
- [Cannot Stack] When Thoracalgia Ryōshū E.G.O Passive 「Breath」 activates, this effect does not activate
